title: Teable | AI Spreadsheet for Business
excerpt: Turn your data into AI workflows and custom apps that 100% fit your business. Connect everything and build anything your business needs.
content_html:
AI Database for Apps, Automations, and Workflows

Stop running your business on scattered spreadsheets and legacy systems

Turn your data into AI workflows and custom apps that 100% fit your business.

Example Teable AI prompts

  • Organize these receipts and extract vendor name, address, category, date, total and tax amount Files: Gas Receipt.jpg, Restaurant Receipt.jpg, ChatGPT Receipt.pdf
  • Build an easy-to-use CRM with lead & follow-up tables and a new-lead notification automation
  • From these sales contracts, extract: buyer, contacts, term dates, total amount, payment terms, items & quantities, governing law, and signing dates Files: Atlas Healthcare.pdf, BlueOrbit Electronics.pdf, Harborview Foods.pdf
  • Organize these resumes into candidate profiles: basics, experience, skills, recent wins, certifications, and gaps Files: Grant Fullem.pdf, Justin Maboyana.pdf, Lily Harasymchuk.pdf
  • Analyze this feedback spreadsheet and, for each row, add sentiment, feedback tags, and a draft reply Files: Customer Reviews.xlsx

Work AI-Native

Describe your needs, and get work organized — in minutes. No learning curve.

content_html_zh:
适用于应用程序、自动化和工作流程的 AI 数据库

停止在分散的电子表格和遗留系统上运行您的业务

将您的数据转化为 100% 适合您业务的 AI 工作流程和自定义应用程序。

Teable AI 提示示例

  • 整理这些收据并提取供应商名称、地址、类别、日期、总额和税额文件：Gas Receipt.jpg、Restaurant Receipt.jpg、ChatGPT Receipt.pdf
  • 构建易于使用的 CRM，其中包含潜在客户和跟进表以及新潜在客户通知自动化
  • 从这些销售合同中，提取：买方、联系人、期限日期、总金额、付款条件、项目和数量、适用法律和签署日期 文件：Atlas Healthcare.pdf、BlueOrbit Electronics.pdf、Harborview Foods.pdf
  • 将这些简历整理成候选人简介：基础知识、经验、技能、最近的胜利、认证和差距 文件：Grant Fullem.pdf、Justin Maboyana.pdf、Lily Harasymchuk.pdf
  • 分析此反馈电子表格，并为每一行添加情绪、反馈标签和草稿回复文件：Customer Reviews.xlsx

工作 AI 原生

描述您的需求，并在几分钟内组织工作。 没有学习曲线。
